title: Bridge Essay: The disunity of consciousness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**The disunity of consciousness.** — Prog Brain Res. PMID: 18166382. DOI: 10.1016/S0079-6123(07)68002-9. Consciousness is commonly considered to be asingle entity, as expressed in the term "unity of consciousness", and neurobiologists are fond of believing that, sooner or later, they will be able to determine its neural correlate (rather than its neural correlates). Here Ipropose an alternative view, derived from compelling experimental and clinical studies of the primate visual cortex, which suggest that consciousness is not asingle unity but consists instead of many components (the micro-consc...
